name: indexer_down
description: Stops the indexer at 30s and observes the effect on m_indexerQueue (proxy: RSS and end_ack_error).
notes: external_actions are fired automatically by run_benchmark.sh (logged to results_*/external_actions.log).

NOTE: at_sec=30 may fire during the sender's ~70s setup phase (agent registration + key_wait=35s). If so, all sessions hit the handleStart Offline guard rail BEFORE entering m_workersQueue and m_indexerQueue is never exercised. Use indexer_down_midflight.json (at_sec=120) for a mid-flight test against an established session pool.
Expect: end_ack_error > 0 while the indexer is down (only if sessions are mid-flight when it stops).
If RSS grows unbounded during the indexer-down window, there is a leak in m_indexerQueue.
